creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Found it:

simply change in files/patch-lib-url.c:
#if defined(__FreeBSD_version)
      data->set.no_signal = TRUE; /* different handling of signals and threads */
#endif /* __FreeBSD_version */

to:

#if defined(__FreeBSD_version)
      data->set.no_signal = 1; /* different handling of signals and threads */
#endif /* __FreeBSD_version */

now it build without problems with both DEBUG options on.
